gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly did her daily rounds checking on all the community apps in the greenhouse. Everything is growing nicely!
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the repository documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and README up-to-date with the latest community usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener/inspector, checking on the 'greenhouse' of community apps represented as glowing code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
